realms.title: Forge of Civilization
realms.description: The central chamber of oversight and coordination. Every other realm in the HIVE world connects back here.

realms.title: Realm of Self
realms.description: A quiet hall of mirrors where citizens reflect on their own history and choices before stepping into the wider HIVE.

realms.title: Realm of Reason
realms.description: A study of logic and strategy, where ATHENA tests the soundness of the HIVE's plans before they are acted upon.

realms.title: Ocean of Inquiry
realms.description: Open water dotted with archive-islands, where questions are cast out and answers drift back on the tide.

realms.title: Realm of Harmony
realms.description: A balanced courtyard where DAO and ZENITH keep the HIVE's incentives and rhythms in tune with one another.

realms.title: Realm of Meaning
realms.description: A library of living stories. SOFIA tends the threads that give the HIVE's events their meaning.

realms.title: Realm of Unity
realms.description: A gathering green where HEARTIS keeps watch over the bonds between citizens and sentinels alike.

realms.title: Frontier of Tomorrow
realms.description: A bright proving ground where VISION, TECHNOS, SYNAPSE, and ORION sketch what the HIVE could become next.

realms.title: Path of Evolution
realms.description: A winding trail of waypoints marking how far the HIVE has come, walked over by NOVA.

realms.title: Spark of Potential
realms.description: A workshop of unfinished things, lit by PROMETHEUS, where new quests and ideas first catch fire.
